best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-segnalazione-001 title: create a new report module: segnalazione source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: - type: true - title: "fraudulent product" - description: "the product is fake." - reported user: user with id 2 - author: user with id 1 test steps: 1. call the constructor segnalazione() with the provided data. 2. verify that the type is set to true. 3. verify that the title is set to "fraudulent product". 4. verify that the description is set to "the product is fake." 5. verify that the reported user is set to the user with id 2. 6. verify that the author is set to the user with id 1. expected result: all attributes should be correctly initialized.
